name: Slack
description: Slack API enables bots and apps to send messages, manage channels, upload files, search messages, add reactions, manage pins and reminders, and interact with users and workspaces.

capabilities.name: chat_postMessage
capabilities.description: Send a message to a channel, DM, or group. Supports text, blocks, and attachments for rich formatting.

capabilities.name: chat_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing message's text, blocks, or attachments.

capabilities.name: chat_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a message from a channel.

capabilities.name: chat_postEphemeral
capabilities.description: Send an ephemeral message visible only to a specific user in a channel.

capabilities.name: chat_scheduleMessage
capabilities.description: Schedule a message to be sent at a future time.

capabilities.name: chat_getPermalink
capabilities.description: Get a permalink URL for a specific message.

capabilities.name: chat_unfurl
capabilities.description: Provide custom unfurl behavior for URLs in messages.

capabilities.name: conversations_list
capabilities.description: List all channels (public, private, IMs, MPIMs) in a workspace.

capabilities.name: conversations_info
capabilities.description: Retrieve information about a specific channel.

capabilities.name: conversations_history
capabilities.description: Fetch message history from a channel.

capabilities.name: conversations_replies
capabilities.description: Retrieve all replies in a message thread.

capabilities.name: conversations_create
capabilities.description: Create a new public or private channel.

capabilities.name: conversations_invite
capabilities.description: Invite users to a channel.

capabilities.name: conversations_kick
capabilities.description: Remove a user from a channel.

capabilities.name: conversations_archive
capabilities.description: Archive a channel.

capabilities.name: conversations_unarchive
capabilities.description: Unarchive a channel.

capabilities.name: conversations_setTopic
capabilities.description: Set the topic of a channel.

capabilities.name: conversations_setPurpose
capabilities.description: Set the purpose of a channel.

capabilities.name: conversations_members
capabilities.description: List members of a channel.

capabilities.name: users_list
capabilities.description: List all users in the workspace.

capabilities.name: users_info
capabilities.description: Retrieve information about a specific user.

capabilities.name: users_lookupByEmail
capabilities.description: Find a user by their email address.

capabilities.name: files_upload
capabilities.description: Upload a file to Slack and share it in channels.

capabilities.name: files_list
capabilities.description: List files shared in the workspace.

capabilities.name: files_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a file from the workspace.

capabilities.name: reactions_add
capabilities.description: Add an emoji reaction to a message.

capabilities.name: reactions_remove
capabilities.description: Remove an emoji reaction from a message.

capabilities.name: reactions_get
capabilities.description: Get reactions for a specific message.

capabilities.name: search_messages
capabilities.description: Search for messages across the workspace using keywords and filters.

capabilities.name: search_files
capabilities.description: Search for files across the workspace.

capabilities.name: pins_add
capabilities.description: Pin a message to a channel.

capabilities.name: pins_remove
capabilities.description: Unpin a message from a channel.

capabilities.name: pins_list
capabilities.description: List pinned items in a channel.

capabilities.name: reminders_add
capabilities.description: Create a reminder for a user.

capabilities.name: reminders_list
capabilities.description: List all reminders for the authenticated user.

capabilities.name: reminders_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a reminder.

capabilities.name: bookmarks_add
capabilities.description: Add a bookmark to a channel.

capabilities.name: bookmarks_list
capabilities.description: List all bookmarks in a channel.

capabilities.name: bookmarks_remove
capabilities.description: Remove a bookmark from a channel.
